subject: Draft: November principal note - bilingual, concrete
body:
Dear Lone Star families,

Three things this month.

One, our science and design lab is on schedule for Phase 2 completion, with the final HVAC balance scheduled Nov 12. Students will be back in the space with full ventilation the week after Thanksgiving.

Two, we heard from 197 families in the dual-language listening survey. Spanish and Vietnamese lead the requests, with strong interest across grades 6 and 7. We will bring a recommendation to the district on Nov 17.

Three, thank you to the 41 volunteers who packed backpacks last weekend. That was our largest single Saturday in three years.

---

Kinh gui quy phu huynh Lone Star,

Ba dieu trong thang nay.

Mot, phong thi nghiem khoa hoc dang dung tien do de hoan tat giai doan hai, lan can bang HVAC cuoi cung se dien ra ngay 12 thang 11. Hoc sinh se tro lai phong voi thong gio day du sau tuan Le Ta On.

Hai, 197 gia dinh da tra loi khao sat song ngu. Tieng Tay Ban Nha va tieng Viet dan dau, quan tam manh o khoi 6 va 7. Chung toi se trinh khuyen nghi len quan ngay 17 thang 11.

Ba, cam on 41 tinh nguyen vien da dong gio balo cuoi tuan truoc. Do la ngay Bay dong nhat trong ba nam.

Do not send from my account. Angela please schedule after review.

Andrew

subject: Draft: STEM Phase 2 board-ready cost picture
body:
Marsh,

Board-ready STEM Phase 2 cost picture on campus LSA-STEM-201.

- Phase 1 base $68,500 signed Feb 12
- Phase 1 change orders $6,200 (BICG-2026-004)
- Phase 2 base $132,000 signed Jul 22
- Escalation addendum $10,560 executed Oct 30 (BICG-2026-011, BLS 6.1 percent over 4.5 threshold, 8 percent tier per Section 4.2)
- Phase 2 change orders $31,500 (BICG-2026-013 through 018)
- Facilities-absorbed on FAC tickets $14,640 raw, less three duplicated line items already carried on Jira (FAC-421008, 421205, 421401 dup Jira STEM-107, 203, 215) net $8,440

DocuSign program subtotal $248,760. All-in with facilities net absorption $257,200. Phase 3 LOI (BICG-2026-019) held in draft pending board vote.

One caveat - Jira STEM-216 flags a data-drop labeling defect on the vendor handoff sheet, so if the board asks for the vendor-derived number I will speak from DocuSign and facilities and note the Jira caveat.

Draft only, not sent.

Andrew
